title: Obsidian Equipment
description: Obsidian can be smelted down like other ores into obsidian ingots. Use obsidian ingots like other ores to craft armor and tools.
body:
[![Logo](https://img1.wsimg.com/isteam/ip/b3784fc8-73a8-4ed5-9033-feb6c6f2806c/blob-19e676c.png/:/rs=w:149,h:149,cg:true,m/cr=w:149,h:149/qt=q:95)](https://exlinemods.com/)

Explore Exline Mods for top-notch gaming accessories and mods. Elevate your gaming experience with our high-quality products. Visit exlinemods.com now to gear up and enhance your gameplay!

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/993245467162972220?color=blue&label=Discord&style=plastic&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/9UVGJGyqbv)

Obsidian can be smelted down like other ores into obsidian ingots. Use obsidian ingots like other ores to craft armor and tools.

[![Downloads](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jexline/images/main/downloads_blueb.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/obsidian-equipment/versions#all-versions)
![1.19.4](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jexline/images/main/icon_1194.png)

Durability - 1796

Efficiency - 8.5
 
Attack Damage - 6.5
   
Enchant-ability - 12
    
Armor Ratings - 35 (3,6,7,3)
    
Armor Enchant-ability - 5
   
Horse Armor Rating - 10
